productDisplayName: Nike Men's Lunar Fly Black Shoe
description: Offering a stable ride and plush cushioning, the nike LunarFly+ 2 offers greater comfort around the heel than its predecessor, the LunarFly, offering an improved Fit around the backfoot. With enhanced comfort, better fit and a more mdoern look, the LunarFly+ 2 works wonders for underpronators and mild overpronators. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.Upper Lightweight mesh upper with mildly perforated overlays for maximum ventilation Bootie inside the mesh that wraps around the foot offering a snug, breathable fit Synthetic overlays strategically placed for enhanced support, added shoe structure and durability Meshed and cushioned tongue with meshed and padded sockliner for snug fit, breathability and in-step comfort TPU swoosh and heel wrap around for style and enhanced support to the back foot Lace-up system for snug fit and to lock the foot on place Reflective elements in the toe and heel for enhanced visibility in low light conditions Midsole Phylon midsole with Lunarlon cushioning for lightweight, soft responsive cushioning and shock absorption Dynamic Support system that adapts to your stride and provides perfect support Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable TPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs and a decoupled heel for maximum traction and support Scooped heel with an impact guidance system for perfect traction, cushioning and stability Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
